title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Wavin India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Wavin India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India Holdings Services:
Wavin India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India Holdings Services!
